profile.tagline: PhD Candidate at FEUP | Researcher at INESC TEC
profile.bio: PhD candidate at the Faculty of Engineering, University of Porto, and researcher at INESC TEC. My work focuses on sequential decision-making, explainable AI, combinatorial optimization, transportation, and inventory management.

education.title: PhD Candidate
education.organization: Faculty of Engineering, University of Porto
education.details: Dissertation: Sequential Decision-Making Applied to Combinatorial Optimization Problems.

education.title: Master
education.organization: Faculty of Engineering, University of Porto
education.details: GPA: 18.0/20. Dissertation: Policy Development for Contemporary Sequential Decision-Making Problems in Transportation and Inventory Management. Grade: 20/20. Relevant coursework: Business Analytics; Optimization; Econometrics.

education.title: Bachelor
education.organization: Faculty of Engineering, University of Porto
education.details: GPA: 16.3/20. Relevant coursework: Math; Economics; Statistics; Energy; Operations Management; Programming.

education.title: Erasmus Exchange
education.details: Erasmus exchange with GPA 8.5/10. Relevant coursework: Multi-criteria decision analysis; Multimodal transportation systems.

professionalExperience.title: Researcher
professionalExperience.details: Research on sequential decision-making and explainable AI applied to transportation and inventory management. Published in IJCAI 2024 and GECCO 2025.

professionalExperience.title: Student and entrepreneur
professionalExperience.details: Participated in the Ready to Startup program and developed an idea focused on optimizing user screen time.

professionalExperience.title: Instructor responsible
professionalExperience.organization: European Students of Industrial Engineering and Management (ESTIEM)
professionalExperience.details: Managed a network of more than 200 instructors across Europe, allocated instructors to courses, and ensured communication with the central team.

professionalExperience.title: Trainee in the digital transformation taskforce
professionalExperience.details: Developed a Lean Six Sigma Green Belt project to increase operations data reliability and integrity across data collection, processing, and exportation.

professionalExperience.title: Trainee in the operations team
professionalExperience.details: Developed a Lean Six Sigma Green Belt project to increase operations data reliability and integrity across data collection, processing, and exportation.

researchExperience.title: PEER (The hyPEr ExpeRt collaborative AI assistant)
researchExperience.details: Focuses on putting the user at the center of the AI design, development, deployment, and evaluation pipeline for mixed human-AI initiatives on complex sequential decision-making problems.

researchExperience.title: TRUST-AI (Transparent, Reliable and Unbiased Smart Tool for AI)
researchExperience.details: Involves human intelligence in the discovery process so that AI and humans work together to find effective, comprehensible, and generalizable solutions.
